---
# EXECUTION-SPEC: PRD-083 — Wave 2 Phase 2.1 — Financial Adjustment Producer Expansion
# Generated by build-pipeline / lead-architect + backend-service-builder
# Generated at: 2026-05-17T21:43:22Z

prd: PRD-083
prd_title: "Wave 2 Phase 2.1 — Financial Adjustment Producer Expansion"
service: PlayerFinancialService
mvp_phase: 2
exec_spec_id: EXEC-083

fib_h: docs/issues/gaps/financial-data-distribution-standard/actions/fibs/wave-2/FIB-H-TRANSACTIONAL-OUTBOX.md
fib_s: docs/issues/gaps/financial-data-distribution-standard/actions/fibs/wave-2/FIB-S-TRANSACTIONAL-OUTBOX.json

write_path_classification: detected
e2e_mandate_waiver: "No operator-visible surface change (http_boundary: false). All write paths are internal SQL/RPC; E2E coverage would require a privileged DB session not available in the Playwright auth model. I1 atomicity proof tests (Jest/pgTAP) cover the write-path invariants directly and are mandatory deliverables."

gov010_check: "waived:continuation-prd-in-active-wave2-pipeline — scaffold (SCAFFOLD-TRANSACTIONAL-OUTBOX.md) and all ADR files (ADR-052 through ADR-057, ADR-040) confirmed on disk; affects field in frontmatter carries ADR references"
fib_s_loaded: true
complexity_prescreen: full

teardown_gate:
  migration: "supabase/migrations/20260517141021_remove_prd082_harness_receipt_proof_state.sql"
  status: applied
  applied_date: "2026-05-17"
  applied_commit: fe327c45
  authority: "docs/issues/gaps/financial-data-distribution-standard/wave-2/w-2-integration-proof/TEARDOWN-ARTIFACT-PRD-082.md"

security_posture_choice:
  option: A
  rationale: >
    Option A (governed SECURITY DEFINER outbox insertion boundary) is locked by PRD-083 v1.4.
    Direct authenticated finance_outbox INSERT must be revoked because a transaction-local
    marker/GUC design is not proven unforgeable by authenticated SQL clients. Existing public
    producer RPC business semantics and caller contracts remain unchanged: SECURITY INVOKER
    producer RPCs may call a narrow SECURITY DEFINER helper after authoritative context
    derivation, but authenticated clients must have no direct finance_outbox INSERT grant or
    INSERT policy.

catalog_verification:
  event_type: adjustment.recorded
  catalog_file: docs/35-integration/INT-002-event-catalog.md
  status: verified_present
  verified_at: "2026-05-17"
  catalog_entry_line: 801
  note: >
    INT-002 line 801 carries the correct ADR-057 eligibility rule matching FR-1.
    No catalog update required before proceeding to WS4_PRODUCER migration.

typescript_layer_status:
  CreateFinancialAdjustmentInput: "no casino_id field — already clean"
  createFinancialAdjustment_caller: "does not pass p_casino_id to RPC — already correct"
  WS5_TS_scope: "verification + db:types-local regeneration only; no code changes required"
  note: >
    The TypeScript caller (services/player-financial/http.ts) has never passed p_casino_id
    and CreateFinancialAdjustmentInput (dtos.ts) has never had a casino_id field. WS5_TS
    confirms no regression was introduced and regenerates DB types after WS4 migration.

execution_phases:
  phase_1:
    parallel: [WS1_TEARDOWN, WS2_CATALOG]
    gate: teardown-confirmed
  phase_2:
    sequential: [WS3_SIG]
    gate: sig-restored
    depends_on: phase_1
  phase_3:
    parallel: [WS4_PRODUCER, WS5_TS]
    gate: producer-extended
    depends_on: phase_2
    note: >
      WS5_TS can run in parallel with WS4_PRODUCER because the TypeScript layer is
      already correct for the 7-param no-p_casino_id signature. WS5_TS runs
      db:types-local after WS4 migration completes (internal sequencing within WS5_TS).
  phase_4:
    sequential: [WS6_TESTS]
    gate: i1-proved
    depends_on: phase_3
  phase_5:
    sequential: [WS7_TRACKER]
    gate: trackers-updated
    depends_on: phase_4

workstreams:
  WS1_TEARDOWN:
    name: PRD-082 Harness Teardown Verification
    description: >
      Verify the PRD-082 integration harness teardown is fully applied to every
      target database environment before Phase 2.1 migrations proceed. File presence
      alone does not satisfy this gate. The teardown migration
      20260517141021_remove_prd082_harness_receipt_proof_state.sql was applied
      2026-05-17 (commit fe327c45). This workstream confirms the database state
      matches the authored migration: outbox_integration_proof_state is absent,
      rpc_commit_consumer_receipt runs its non-harness body (returns
      'processed'/'duplicate' with no proof-state INSERT), and harness-only grants
      are revoked. Provides the pre-state baseline that WS4_PRODUCER's migration
      assertion will check at apply time.
    executor: backend-service-builder
    executor_type: skill
    depends_on: []
    traces_to: [CAP-1, RULE-1, infrastructure]
    acceptance_criteria:
      - "SELECT count(*) FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema = 'public' AND table_name = 'outbox_integration_proof_state' = 0"
      - "rpc_commit_consumer_receipt source contains no INSERT INTO outbox_integration_proof_state"
      - "outbox_integration_proof_state has no remaining service_role grants in target database environments"
    outputs:
      - "verification note in checkpoint (no file artifacts)"
    gate: teardown-confirmed
    estimated_complexity: low

  WS2_CATALOG:
    name: Event Catalog Verification
    description: >
      Verify adjustment.recorded is correctly registered in the canonical Wave 2
      event catalog (docs/35-integration/INT-002-event-catalog.md) with matching
      fact_class, origin_label, producer RPC, and ADR-057 eligibility rule before
      the producer migration is authored. FR-5 requires this gate to pass before
      WS4_PRODUCER proceeds.

      Verified at EXEC-SPEC generation time: INT-002 line 801 carries:
        event_type: adjustment.recorded
        class: A
        fact_class: ledger
        origin_label: actual
        producer: rpc_create_financial_adjustment
        emission rule: matches FR-1 ADR-057 eligibility condition (original source='pit',
          direction='in', tender_type IN ('cash','chips'), rating_slip_id resolves
          to same-casino rating_slip.table_id)

      No catalog update is required. This workstream is a gate confirmation only.
    executor: backend-service-builder
    executor_type: skill
    depends_on: []
    traces_to: [CAP-5, RULE-7]
    acceptance_criteria:
      - "adjustment.recorded entry present in INT-002 Wave 2 Finance Outbox event_type registry table"
      - "fact_class = ledger, origin_label = actual confirmed in catalog entry"
      - "ADR-057 eligibility rule in emission_rule column matches FR-1 (original pit/in/cash|chips + same-casino rating_slip.table_id)"
      - "Producer RPC column references rpc_create_financial_adjustment"
    outputs:
      - "verification note in checkpoint (no file changes required)"
    gate: catalog-verified
    estimated_complexity: low

  WS3_SIG:
    name: RPC Signature Remediation
    description: >
      Restore the ADR-040/PRD-044 canonical no-p_casino_id signature for
      rpc_create_financial_adjustment. Migration 20260512021632 (Bug-3 fix)
      applied CREATE OR REPLACE with p_casino_id as the first required parameter,
      reintroducing the stale 8-argument shape that PRD-044 (migration
      20260306224345_prd044_cleanup_adjustment_compat.sql) had removed.

      This migration must:
        1. Execute a pre-state assertion confirming PRD-082 teardown is applied
           (outbox_integration_proof_state absent).
        2. Explicitly DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS for the stale 8-argument overloads:
           - rpc_create_financial_adjustment(uuid, uuid, uuid, numeric, adjustment_reason_code, text, uuid, text)
           - any other overload where the first parameter is named p_casino_id
        3. CREATE OR REPLACE rpc_create_financial_adjustment with the canonical
           7-parameter no-p_casino_id signature:
             p_player_id uuid,
             p_visit_id  uuid,
             p_delta_amount numeric,
             p_reason_code  adjustment_reason_code,
             p_note         text,
             p_original_txn_id uuid DEFAULT NULL,
             p_idempotency_key  text DEFAULT NULL
           SECURITY INVOKER (ADR-040), SET search_path = pg_catalog, public
        4. Derive casino context via set_rls_context_from_staff() (ADR-024/ADR-040),
           NOT from caller-supplied parameter. Remove the v_casino_id <> p_casino_id
           cross-check that referenced the now-dropped parameter.
        5. Preserve the Bug-3 DO NOTHING idempotency fix (ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
           + SELECT fallback on replay). Do not reintroduce ON CONFLICT DO UPDATE.
        6. Include a function catalog assertion after CREATE OR REPLACE proving
           no executable overload of rpc_create_financial_adjustment accepts
           p_casino_id (introspect pg_proc / information_schema.routines).
        7. Re-grant EXECUTE to authenticated and service_role on the canonical
           7-param signature only.

      The outbox emission logic is NOT added in this migration — that is WS4_PRODUCER.
      WS3_SIG produces only a clean 7-param function body that matches the TypeScript
      caller in services/player-financial/http.ts.
    executor: backend-service-builder
    executor_type: skill
    depends_on: [WS1_TEARDOWN]
    traces_to: [CAP-1, RULE-1, infrastructure]
    acceptance_criteria:
      - "No rpc_create_financial_adjustment overload with p_casino_id exists in pg_proc after migration"
      - "rpc_create_financial_adjustment(uuid, uuid, numeric, adjustment_reason_code, text, uuid, text) resolves successfully (7-param canonical shape)"
      - "SET search_path = pg_catalog, public in function definition"
      - "SECURITY INVOKER confirmed"
      - "DO NOTHING idempotency fix preserved (no ON CONFLICT DO UPDATE)"
      - "Existing TypeScript caller shape (http.ts lines 183-194) matches new signature without modification"
      - "Function catalog introspection assertion included in migration and passes"
      - "npm run db:types-local exits 0 after this migration"
    outputs:
      - "supabase/migrations/<timestamp>_wave2_adj_sig_restore.sql"
    gate: sig-restored
    estimated_complexity: medium

  WS4_PRODUCER:
    name: Adjustment Producer Extension + Security Hardening
    description: >
      Extend rpc_create_financial_adjustment with conditional ADR-057-eligible
      finance_outbox emission inside its PostgreSQL RPC transaction boundary. Implement
      security hardening (Option A: governed SECURITY DEFINER outbox insertion boundary)
      to deny direct authenticated table-API finance_outbox inserts while preserving
      existing producer business semantics and caller contracts.

      === Pre-state assertions (migration must ABORT with loud message if any fail) ===

      1. PRD-082 teardown applied:
           ASSERT NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.tables
             WHERE table_schema = 'public'
               AND table_name = 'outbox_integration_proof_state')
           'PRE-STATE FAIL: PRD-082 harness table still exists'

      2. No duplicate (aggregate_id, event_type) in finance_outbox:
           ASSERT NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM public.finance_outbox
             GROUP BY aggregate_id, event_type HAVING COUNT(*) > 1)
           'PRE-STATE FAIL: duplicate finance_outbox aggregate_id/event_type rows exist'

      3. Stale p_casino_id overload is absent (WS3_SIG must have applied):
           ASSERT NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM pg_proc
             WHERE proname = 'rpc_create_financial_adjustment'
               AND proargnames @> ARRAY['p_casino_id'])
           'PRE-STATE FAIL: stale p_casino_id overload still present — apply WS3_SIG migration first'

      === Uniqueness constraint ===

      Add UNIQUE constraint on (aggregate_id, event_type) to prevent duplicate
      outbox rows per logical aggregate. This is the mandatory idempotency guard
      for FR-9. Pre-state assertion #2 above must pass before this DDL applies.

      ALTER TABLE public.finance_outbox
        ADD CONSTRAINT uq_finance_outbox_aggregate_event
        UNIQUE (aggregate_id, event_type);

      The UNIQUE (aggregate_id, event_type) constraint guards producer duplication
      only. It MUST NOT be interpreted as a replay-processing constraint. Replay
      operates on existing immutable `finance_outbox` rows and must not re-author
      producer inserts.

      === Option A security hardening ===

      The current finance_outbox_insert_staff INSERT policy is too permissive —
      it allows any authenticated client with app.casino_id set to insert directly.
      Remove direct authenticated table INSERT capability and move outbox table writes
      behind a governed SECURITY DEFINER SQL boundary.

      The governed SECURITY DEFINER helper is infrastructure-only. It MUST NOT
      classify producer semantics, derive event categories, branch on producer business
      meaning, mutate payload structure, route to multiple destinations, or author any
      table other than `finance_outbox`.

      Its responsibility is limited to deterministic envelope validation plus
      `finance_outbox` insertion within the active RPC transaction boundary.

      1. DROP POLICY IF EXISTS finance_outbox_insert_staff ON public.finance_outbox;

      2. REVOKE INSERT ON public.finance_outbox FROM authenticated;

      3. Assert post-state:
           ASSERT NOT has_table_privilege('authenticated', 'public.finance_outbox', 'INSERT')
           and ASSERT no authenticated INSERT/ALL policy exists for finance_outbox.

      4. Add or update a narrow SECURITY DEFINER helper for deterministic finance_outbox
         insertion. Helper requirements:
           - SET search_path = ''
           - no caller-supplied execution casino_id
           - derive/validate casino scope from authoritative session context already set by
             set_rls_context_from_staff()
           - validate envelope semantics for event_type/fact_class/origin_label/table_id/player_id
           - expose EXECUTE only to producer RPC execution roles needed by the existing producers
           - perform no business-logic branching beyond deterministic envelope insertion

      5. Existing exemplar producers MUST remain behaviorally unchanged. Adaptation is
         permitted only to the minimum extent required to route deterministic
         `finance_outbox` insertion through the governed helper boundary.

         No producer business semantics, event catalog values, relay behavior, payload
         shape, or eligibility logic may be changed.

      6. rpc_create_financial_adjustment uses the same governed outbox insertion boundary
         for the new adjustment.recorded emission.

      === Outbox extension for rpc_create_financial_adjustment ===

      Follow the Class A exemplar pattern from
      supabase/migrations/20260511134600_wave2_rpc_create_financial_txn_ext.sql.
      After the PFT INSERT (with DO NOTHING idempotency and SELECT replay from WS3),
      before RETURN v_row, add the ADR-057 eligibility check and conditional outbox INSERT:

      -- Eligibility gating (ADR-057):
      IF p_original_txn_id IS NOT NULL THEN
        SELECT *  INTO v_original_txn FROM public.player_financial_transaction
          WHERE id = p_original_txn_id AND casino_id = v_casino_id;

        -- Check all ADR-057 conditions on original PFT
        IF v_original_txn.casino_id = v_casino_id
           AND v_original_txn.player_id = p_player_id
           AND v_original_txn.visit_id = p_visit_id
           AND v_original_txn.source = 'pit'
           AND v_original_txn.direction = 'in'
           AND v_original_txn.tender_type IN ('cash', 'chips')
           AND v_original_txn.rating_slip_id IS NOT NULL
        THEN
          -- Resolve rating_slip_id → same-casino table_id
          SELECT rs.table_id INTO v_table_id
            FROM public.rating_slip rs
           WHERE rs.id = v_original_txn.rating_slip_id
             AND rs.casino_id = v_casino_id;

          IF v_table_id IS NULL THEN
            -- Inherited rating_slip_id present but does not resolve → reject write
            RAISE EXCEPTION 'INVALID_INPUT: inherited rating_slip_id does not resolve to a same-casino table. Financial write rejected.'
              USING ERRCODE = 'P0001';
          END IF;

          -- Idempotency guard: outbox row already exists for this aggregate
          IF NOT EXISTS (
            SELECT 1 FROM public.finance_outbox
             WHERE aggregate_id = v_row.id AND event_type = 'adjustment.recorded'
          ) THEN
            PERFORM public.<governed_finance_outbox_insert_helper>(
              public.generate_uuid_v7(),
              'adjustment.recorded',   -- hardcoded (FR-2)
              'ledger',                -- hardcoded (FR-2)
              'actual',                -- hardcoded (FR-2)
              v_casino_id,
              v_table_id,
              v_row.player_id,         -- NOT NULL required (FR-3)
              v_row.id,                -- aggregate_id = PFT row id (FR-3)
              jsonb_build_object(
                'amount',          v_row.amount,       -- signed numeric (FR-10)
                'pft_direction',   v_row.direction,    -- literal PFT direction (FR-10)
                'delta_direction', CASE WHEN v_row.amount > 0 THEN 'increase' ELSE 'decrease' END,
                'reason_code',     v_row.reason_code   -- FR-10
              ),
              NOW()
            );
          END IF;
        END IF;
        -- Excluded case: original PFT does not meet ADR-057 criteria → no outbox row, no error
      END IF;
      -- Unlinked case: p_original_txn_id IS NULL → no outbox row, no error

      === Payload contract (FR-10) ===
        amount:          signed numeric delta from PFT amount (same as v_row.amount)
        pft_direction:   literal PFT direction (always 'in' for adjustments)
        delta_direction: 'increase' if amount > 0, 'decrease' if amount < 0
        reason_code:     adjustment reason code
        note:            OMITTED (may be sensitive)

      === player_id NOT NULL enforcement (FR-3) ===
      After the outbox INSERT, add an assertion:
        ASSERT v_row.player_id IS NOT NULL,
          'INVARIANT VIOLATION: player_id is NULL on adjustment outbox row';

      === Migration structure summary ===
      BEGIN;
        -- Pre-state assertion 1: teardown applied
        -- Pre-state assertion 2: no duplicate aggregate_id/event_type
        -- Pre-state assertion 3: stale overload absent
        -- ALTER TABLE: add UNIQUE (aggregate_id, event_type)
        -- DROP POLICY finance_outbox_insert_staff
        -- REVOKE INSERT ON public.finance_outbox FROM authenticated
        -- CREATE/UPDATE governed SECURITY DEFINER outbox insert helper
        -- CREATE OR REPLACE rpc_create_financial_txn only if needed to preserve helper-backed insert
        -- CREATE OR REPLACE rpc_record_grind_observation only if needed to preserve helper-backed insert
        -- CREATE OR REPLACE rpc_create_financial_adjustment (add outbox emission through helper)
        -- Post-state assertions: zero authenticated INSERT grants/policies
        -- COMMENT ON FUNCTION
      COMMIT;
      NOTIFY pgrst, 'reload schema';
    executor: backend-service-builder
    executor_type: skill
    depends_on: [WS3_SIG, WS2_CATALOG]
    traces_to: [CAP-1, CAP-5, RULE-1, RULE-7]
    acceptance_criteria:
      - "finance_outbox has UNIQUE constraint on (aggregate_id, event_type) after migration"
      - "finance_outbox_insert_staff policy is dropped"
      - "authenticated has no INSERT privilege on public.finance_outbox"
      - "finance_outbox has no authenticated INSERT/ALL policy"
      - "Governed SECURITY DEFINER outbox insert helper uses SET search_path = '' and accepts no caller-supplied execution casino_id"
      - "rpc_create_financial_txn producer success is preserved through the governed outbox insertion boundary"
      - "rpc_record_grind_observation producer success is preserved through the governed outbox insertion boundary"
      - "rpc_create_financial_adjustment emits through the governed outbox insertion boundary"
      - "rpc_create_financial_adjustment emits finance_outbox row for eligible linked adjustments"
      - "Unlinked adjustments (p_original_txn_id IS NULL) produce zero finance_outbox rows"
      - "Excluded adjustments (original fails ADR-057 check) produce zero finance_outbox rows"
      - "Adjustment with inherited invalid/cross-casino rating_slip_id rejects the entire write"
      - "Outbox row has event_type='adjustment.recorded', fact_class='ledger', origin_label='actual'"
      - "Outbox row player_id is NOT NULL"
      - "Outbox row table_id is NOT NULL and derived from original rating_slip.table_id"
      - "Outbox row aggregate_id = PFT row id for the adjustment"
      - "Outbox row event_id is generate_uuid_v7() (not static)"
      - "Payload includes amount (signed numeric), pft_direction, delta_direction, reason_code"
      - "All three pre-state assertions are present and would abort with clear message if failed"
      - "npm run db:types-local exits 0 after this migration"
    outputs:
      - "supabase/migrations/<timestamp>_wave2_adj_producer_ext.sql"
    gate: producer-extended
    estimated_complexity: high

  WS5_TS:
    name: TypeScript Layer Verification + DB Types Regeneration
    description: >
      Verify no casino_id leakage in the TypeScript adjustment layer and regenerate
      database types after WS4_PRODUCER migration.

      Pre-flight state (confirmed at EXEC-SPEC generation):
        - CreateFinancialAdjustmentInput (services/player-financial/dtos.ts) has no
          casino_id field — already correct
        - createFinancialAdjustment caller (services/player-financial/http.ts lines
          183-194) does not pass p_casino_id to rpc_create_financial_adjustment —
          already correct

      Steps:
        1. Run npm run db:types-local after WS4_PRODUCER migration is applied to
           regenerate types/database.types.ts from the updated schema.
        2. Verify CreateFinancialAdjustmentInput in dtos.ts still has no casino_id.
        3. Verify the RPC call in http.ts still matches the canonical 7-param signature
           (p_player_id, p_visit_id, p_delta_amount, p_reason_code, p_note, optional
           p_original_txn_id, p_idempotency_key).
        4. Verify no other TypeScript file passes casino_id to
           rpc_create_financial_adjustment (grep check).
        5. Verify no TypeScript file authors adjustment producer rows in finance_outbox
           (grep check for finance_outbox INSERT in TypeScript, excluding legitimate relay
           lifecycle reads/updates — FR-4 TS-layer proof).
        6. Run npm run type-check exits 0.
        7. Run npm run lint exits 0.

      If any grep reveals a casino_id reference in the adjustment call path, or any
      TypeScript adjustment producer outbox INSERT, the workstream fails and must report
      the exact file/line.
    executor: backend-service-builder
    executor_type: skill
    depends_on: [WS3_SIG]
    traces_to: [CAP-1, RULE-1]
    acceptance_criteria:
      - "npm run db:types-local exits 0 after WS4 migration"
      - "No casino_id field in CreateFinancialAdjustmentInput"
      - "No p_casino_id in createFinancialAdjustment RPC call arguments"
      - "grep for rpc_create_financial_adjustment across TypeScript files shows no p_casino_id argument"
      - "grep for finance_outbox in TypeScript files shows no adjustment producer INSERT statement; relay lifecycle reads/updates remain allowed"
      - "npm run type-check exits 0"
      - "npm run lint exits 0"
    outputs:
      - "types/database.types.ts (regenerated)"
    gate: types-clean
    estimated_complexity: low

  WS6_TESTS:
    name: Test Suite — I1 Atomicity Proof, Exclusion Paths, Idempotency, Security, Relay Smoke
    description: >
      Full adjustment-path test suite per PRD-083 §8 DoD Testing section and Appendix B.
      The I1 atomicity proof for rpc_create_financial_adjustment is a required exit gate
      deliverable (the Phase 2.0 exemplar proof does not certify this producer path).

      === Test file locations ===
        - tests/failure/i1-atomicity-adjustment.test.ts   (new — I1 proof for adjustment path)
        - services/player-financial/__tests__/outbox-adjustment-producer.test.ts  (new)
        - services/player-financial/__tests__/outbox-producers.test.ts  (regression — existing)
        - services/player-financial/__tests__/outbox-relay.test.ts       (regression — existing)
        - services/player-financial/__tests__/outbox-consumer.test.ts    (regression — existing)

      === Required test cases (Appendix B) ===

      I1 Atomicity proof (tests/failure/i1-atomicity-adjustment.test.ts):
        - T1 ELIGIBLE ROLLBACK: inject controlled mid-transaction failure after PFT INSERT
          and before outbox INSERT. Assert: 0 rows in player_financial_transaction for
          test player_id; 0 rows in finance_outbox for test table_id. No partial state.
          The injection hook (GUC app.test_fail_before_outbox_adjustment or equivalent)
          must be transaction-namespaced, default-off, and impossible to activate through
          ordinary authenticated REST calls. Include a production-safety assertion
          confirming the injection hook cannot be activated without superuser/service_role.
        - T2 ELIGIBLE SUCCESS: call with p_original_txn_id linked to rated pit cash/chips
          original whose rating_slip_id resolves to same-casino rating_slip.table_id.
          Assert: exactly 1 PFT row; exactly 1 finance_outbox row with
          event_type='adjustment.recorded', fact_class='ledger', origin_label='actual',
          player_id NOT NULL.
        - T3 EXCLUDED — unlinked: call with p_original_txn_id = NULL.
          Assert: 1 valid PFT row; 0 finance_outbox rows.
        - T4 EXCLUDED — cage/marker original: call with p_original_txn_id linking to a
          cage/marker/unrated original (source != 'pit' or tender_type not in cash/chips
          or rating_slip_id NULL). Assert: 1 valid PFT row; 0 finance_outbox rows.
        - T5 EXCLUDED — invalid/cross-casino rating_slip_id: call where original has a
          rating_slip_id that does not resolve to same-casino table. Assert: EXCEPTION
          raised; 0 PFT rows; 0 finance_outbox rows.
        - T6 IDEMPOTENCY RETRY: retry with same (casino_id, idempotency_key). Assert: 1 PFT
          row; at most 1 adjustment.recorded row for the aggregate.
        - T7 CONCURRENT RETRY: two simultaneous eligible calls with same idempotency key.
          Assert: 1 PFT row; at most 1 finance_outbox row for the aggregate. The UNIQUE
          constraint on (aggregate_id, event_type) must prevent the second INSERT from
          creating a duplicate.

      Payload contract (outbox-adjustment-producer.test.ts):
        - T8 PAYLOAD POSITIVE DELTA: positive p_delta_amount → outbox row amount > 0,
          pft_direction = 'in', delta_direction = 'increase'.
        - T9 PAYLOAD NEGATIVE DELTA: negative p_delta_amount → outbox row amount < 0,
          pft_direction = 'in', delta_direction = 'decrease'.
        - T10 PAYLOAD FIELDS: assert payload includes amount, pft_direction,
          delta_direction, reason_code; does not include note (sensitive omission).

      Security tests (outbox-adjustment-producer.test.ts):
        - T11 DIRECT INSERT DENIED: authenticated client attempts direct INSERT into
          finance_outbox without going through a producer RPC. Assert: insert fails
          because authenticated has no INSERT privilege/policy on finance_outbox.
        - T12 SAME-CASINO ADJUSTMENT FORGERY DENIED: authenticated client with valid
          casino context after set_rls_context_from_staff() attempts to forge
          adjustment.recorded via table API. Assert: denied.
        - T13 BUYIN FORGERY DENIED: same client attempts to forge buyin.recorded.
          Assert: denied.
        - T14 ARBITRARY PAYLOAD FORGERY DENIED: same client attempts arbitrary payload.
          Assert: denied.
        - T15 STALE OVERLOAD ABSENT: introspect pg_proc; assert no
          rpc_create_financial_adjustment overload has p_casino_id in proargnames.

      Relay operability smoke (outbox-adjustment-producer.test.ts):
        - T16 RELAY FAILURE KEEPS UNPROCESSED: inject consumer failure for adjustment
          event. Assert: outbox row keeps processed_at IS NULL; last_error is bounded
          (not a stack trace blob); delivery_attempts increments.
        - T17 RELAY RETRY SUCCEEDS: after T16 failure, retry delivery. Assert:
          processed_at is set; consumer returns 'processed'.

      T16–T17 validate only that `adjustment.recorded` rows remain compatible with
      the existing relay lifecycle. They MUST NOT introduce new retry policy, DLQ
      semantics, observability schema, relay backoff behavior, or consumer architecture.

      Unit tests (outbox-adjustment-producer.test.ts):
        - T18 SINGLE RPC PATH: assert createFinancialAdjustment in http.ts calls exactly
          one supabase.rpc('rpc_create_financial_adjustment', ...) with no TypeScript-layer
          adjustment producer finance_outbox INSERT. No mock of supabase internals — check
          the source directly with a grep/AST assertion or by mocking supabase.rpc and
          asserting it is called once with the expected args and no secondary adjustment
          outbox producer call exists.

      Regression (existing suites must remain green):
        - tests/failure/ I1–I4 harness (19 existing tests) — no regression from migrations
        - services/player-financial/__tests__/outbox-producers.test.ts (8 unit + 3 skipped)
        - services/player-financial/__tests__/outbox-relay.test.ts (8 tests)
        - services/player-financial/__tests__/outbox-consumer.test.ts (6 tests)

      === GUC injection hook safety ===
      If a GUC-based failure injection hook is used for T1 (e.g., app.test_fail_adj_before_outbox):
        - Must be SET LOCAL inside a test-only helper function
        - Default value: empty string / not set
        - Must NOT be grantable or settable through any authenticated REST endpoint
        - Must include a production-safety assertion test: prove the GUC cannot be set
          by a regular authenticated RPC call (T1 companion assertion)
    executor: backend-service-builder
    executor_type: skill
    depends_on: [WS4_PRODUCER, WS5_TS]
    traces_to: [CAP-1, CAP-3, RULE-1, RULE-3, RULE-4]
    acceptance_criteria:
      - "tests/failure/i1-atomicity-adjustment.test.ts passes T1–T7"
      - "outbox-adjustment-producer.test.ts passes T8–T18"
      - "All 19 existing tests/failure/ tests remain green"
      - "outbox-producers.test.ts, outbox-relay.test.ts, outbox-consumer.test.ts remain green"
      - "I1 matrix entry for rpc_create_financial_adjustment in WAVE-2-TRACKER.json is updated with harness_result"
    outputs:
      - "tests/failure/i1-atomicity-adjustment.test.ts"
      - "services/player-financial/__tests__/outbox-adjustment-producer.test.ts"
    gate: i1-proved
    estimated_complexity: high

  WS7_TRACKER:
    name: Governance Tracker + SRM Updates
    description: >
      Update all three Wave 2 governance trackers and verify SRM boundary cleanup
      to reflect Phase 2.1 completion.
      Must only execute after WS6_TESTS passes all gates.

      === WAVE-2-TRACKER.json ===
        - phases[2.1].status → "complete"
        - phases[2.1].prd → "PRD-083"
        - phases[2.1].exec_spec → "EXEC-083"
        - phases[2.1].exit_date → today's date
        - phases[2.1].commit → the Phase 2.1 merge commit SHA
        - validation_matrix.I1_atomicity.proofs[rpc_create_financial_adjustment].harness_result →
            "T1-T7 PASS" (or actual test count/result)
        - validation_matrix.I1_atomicity.proofs[rpc_create_financial_adjustment].phase → "2.1"
        - deferred_register[WS_PRODUCER_ADJUSTMENT].status → "complete"

      === WAVE-2-PROGRESS-TRACKER.md ===
        - §1 table: Phase 2.1 row → "✅ COMPLETE"
        - §7 Phase 2.1 status header → "✅ COMPLETE"
        - §7 Phase 2.1 entry gate → remove ⚠️, mark all items ✅
        - §7 Phase 2.1 deliverables checkboxes → all ✅
        - §6 Immediate Next Actions: check off Phase 2.1 items, advance to Phase 2.2

      === ROLLOUT-TRACKER.json ===
        - cursor.active_phase → "2.2"
        - cursor.last_closed_phase → "2.1"
        - cursor.last_closed_date → today's date
        - cursor.last_closed_prd → "PRD-083"
        - cursor.last_closed_exec → "EXEC-083"
        - cursor.last_closed_commit → Phase 2.1 merge commit SHA
        - cursor.phase_status → "active_phase_2_2_prd_pending"
        - cursor.next_action → "1. Author Phase 2.2 PRD for rpc_request_table_fill + rpc_request_table_credit (simultaneous — ADR-055 intra-category parity). 2. /lead-architect EXEC-SPEC scaffold. 3. /build PRD-###."

      === SERVICE_RESPONSIBILITY_MATRIX.md ===
        - PlayerFinancialService owns `finance_outbox` as Wave 2 transport infrastructure
        - Cross-context allowlist includes FinanceService → RatingSlipService narrow
          ADR-057 same-casino `rating_slip_id → rating_slip.table_id` producer eligibility lookup
        - The FinanceService → RatingSlipService allowlist is a narrow ADR-057
          table-anchor lookup exception only: `rating_slip_id → rating_slip.table_id`
          for same-casino adjustment eligibility. It MUST NOT establish a generic
          cross-context dependency or authorize broader RatingSlip reads from Finance.
        - No generic event bus, dispatcher, projection store, consumer branch, envelope change,
          or producer business-semantics rewrite is introduced by this phase
    executor: backend-service-builder
    executor_type: skill
    depends_on: [WS6_TESTS]
    traces_to: [infrastructure]
    acceptance_criteria:
      - "WAVE-2-TRACKER.json phases[2.1].status = 'complete'"
      - "ROLLOUT-TRACKER.json cursor.active_phase = '2.2'"
      - "ROLLOUT-TRACKER.json cursor.last_closed_phase = '2.1'"
      - "WAVE-2-PROGRESS-TRACKER.md §1 Phase 2.1 row shows ✅ COMPLETE"
      - "WAVE-2-PROGRESS-TRACKER.md §5 teardown status still reflects APPLIED (no regression)"
      - "I1 validation matrix entry for rpc_create_financial_adjustment filled with actual result"
      - "SERVICE_RESPONSIBILITY_MATRIX.md marks finance_outbox as Wave 2 transport infrastructure"
      - "SERVICE_RESPONSIBILITY_MATRIX.md allowlists FinanceService → RatingSlipService ADR-057 table-anchor lookup"
    outputs:
      - "docs/issues/gaps/financial-data-distribution-standard/wave-2/WAVE-2-TRACKER.json"
      - "docs/issues/gaps/financial-data-distribution-standard/wave-2/WAVE-2-PROGRESS-TRACKER.md"
      - "docs/issues/gaps/financial-data-distribution-standard/actions/ROLLOUT-TRACKER.json"
      - "docs/20-architecture/SERVICE_RESPONSIBILITY_MATRIX.md"
    gate: trackers-updated
    estimated_complexity: low

gates:
  teardown-confirmed:
    type: schema-validation
    command: >
      SELECT count(*) FROM information_schema.tables
       WHERE table_schema = 'public' AND table_name = 'outbox_integration_proof_state';
      -- Expected: 0

  catalog-verified:
    type: documentation-check
    command: >
      grep 'adjustment.recorded' docs/35-integration/INT-002-event-catalog.md
      -- Expected: entry present with correct fact_class, origin_label, producer columns

  sig-restored:
    type: schema-validation
    commands:
      - >
        SELECT count(*) FROM pg_proc p
          JOIN pg_namespace n ON n.oid = p.pronamespace
         WHERE n.nspname = 'public'
           AND p.proname = 'rpc_create_financial_adjustment'
           AND 'p_casino_id' = ANY(p.proargnames);
        -- Expected: 0
      - "npm run db:types-local"

  producer-extended:
    type: schema-validation
    commands:
      - >
        SELECT conname FROM pg_constraint
         WHERE conrelid = 'public.finance_outbox'::regclass
           AND conname = 'uq_finance_outbox_aggregate_event';
        -- Expected: 1 row
      - >
        SELECT count(*)
          FROM pg_policies
         WHERE schemaname = 'public'
           AND tablename = 'finance_outbox'
           AND roles::text LIKE '%authenticated%'
           AND cmd IN ('INSERT', 'ALL');
        -- Expected: 0
      - >
        SELECT has_table_privilege('authenticated', 'public.finance_outbox', 'INSERT');
        -- Expected: false
      - "npm run db:types-local"

  types-clean:
    type: ci
    commands:
      - "npm run type-check"
      - "npm run lint"

  i1-proved:
    type: test
    commands:
      - "npx jest tests/failure/i1-atomicity-adjustment.test.ts --forceExit > /tmp/i1-adjustment.log 2>&1"
      - "npx jest services/player-financial/__tests__/ --forceExit > /tmp/outbox-suite.log 2>&1"
      - "npx jest tests/failure/ --forceExit > /tmp/failure-suite.log 2>&1"
    read_logs:
      - "/tmp/i1-adjustment.log"
      - "/tmp/outbox-suite.log"
      - "/tmp/failure-suite.log"

  trackers-updated:
    type: documentation-check
    commands:
      - "node -e \"const t = require('./docs/issues/gaps/financial-data-distribution-standard/wave-2/WAVE-2-TRACKER.json'); console.log(t.phases.find(p=>p.id==='2.1').status)\""
      - "node -e \"const r = require('./docs/issues/gaps/financial-data-distribution-standard/actions/ROLLOUT-TRACKER.json'); console.log(r.cursor.active_phase)\""

dod:
  functionality:
    - "rpc_create_financial_adjustment emits one finance_outbox row per ADR-057-eligible linked adjustment"
    - "Unlinked and excluded adjustments produce valid PFT rows and zero outbox rows"
    - "Failed/rolled-back adjustments produce zero rows in both tables"

  data_integrity:
    - "adjustment.recorded verified in INT-002 before producer migration applied"
    - "event_id is generate_uuid_v7() (not static)"
    - "player_id is never NULL on adjustment outbox rows"
    - "Retrying same idempotency key does not create duplicate adjustment.recorded row"
    - "UNIQUE constraint on (aggregate_id, event_type) enforced at DB level"
    - "Payload includes amount, pft_direction, delta_direction, reason_code"

  security:
    - "No TypeScript-layer adjustment producer INSERT path for finance_outbox"
    - "Direct authenticated INSERT into finance_outbox denied (T11–T14 pass)"
    - "authenticated has no INSERT privilege/policy on finance_outbox"
    - "rpc_create_financial_adjustment final signature has no p_casino_id"
    - "No executable stale overload accepts p_casino_id (T15 pass)"
    - "PRD-082 harness teardown confirmed applied; Phase 2.1 migration pre-state assertion catches any regression"

  testing:
    - "I1 atomicity proof test (T1–T7) passes for adjustment path"
    - "T8–T18 pass in outbox-adjustment-producer.test.ts"
    - "All 19 existing failure harness tests remain green"
    - "Existing outbox-producers, outbox-relay, outbox-consumer suites remain green"

  operational_readiness:
    - "npm run db:types-local exits 0"
    - "npm run type-check exits 0"
    - "npm run lint exits 0"
    - "npm run build exits 0"

  governance:
    - "WAVE-2-TRACKER.json Phase 2.1 status = complete"
    - "ROLLOUT-TRACKER.json cursor.active_phase = '2.2'"
    - "WAVE-2-PROGRESS-TRACKER.md Phase 2.1 row = COMPLETE"
    - "SRM marks finance_outbox as Wave 2 transport infrastructure and allowlists FinanceService → RatingSlipService ADR-057 table-anchor lookup"
    - "No projection store, consumer branch, generic event bus, generic dispatcher, envelope change, or producer business-semantics rewrite introduced"

references:
  - "PRD-083: docs/10-prd/PRD-083-wave2-phase-2.1-adjustment-producer-expansion-v0.md"
  - "Exemplar pattern: supabase/migrations/20260511134600_wave2_rpc_create_financial_txn_ext.sql"
  - "Bug-3 fix (current stale state): supabase/migrations/20260512021632_fix_wave2_transport_path_bugs.sql"
  - "PRD-044 canonical no-p_casino_id precedent: supabase/migrations/20260306224345_prd044_cleanup_adjustment_compat.sql"
  - "Teardown migration: supabase/migrations/20260517141021_remove_prd082_harness_receipt_proof_state.sql"
  - "INT-002 event catalog: docs/35-integration/INT-002-event-catalog.md"
  - "FIB-H: docs/issues/gaps/financial-data-distribution-standard/actions/fibs/wave-2/FIB-H-TRANSACTIONAL-OUTBOX.md"
  - "FIB-S: docs/issues/gaps/financial-data-distribution-standard/actions/fibs/wave-2/FIB-S-TRANSACTIONAL-OUTBOX.json"
  - "ADR-040: docs/21-exec-spec/ADR-040/EXEC-SPEC-ADR-040.md"
  - "ADR-052–057: docs/80-adrs/"
  - "I1 harness exemplar: tests/failure/i1-atomicity.test.ts"
  - "WAVE-2-TRACKER.json: docs/issues/gaps/financial-data-distribution-standard/wave-2/WAVE-2-TRACKER.json"
  - "ROLLOUT-TRACKER.json: docs/issues/gaps/financial-data-distribution-standard/actions/ROLLOUT-TRACKER.json"
  - "Teardown authority: docs/issues/gaps/financial-data-distribution-standard/wave-2/w-2-integration-proof/TEARDOWN-ARTIFACT-PRD-082.md"
  - "SRM: docs/20-architecture/SERVICE_RESPONSIBILITY_MATRIX.md"
---

# EXEC-083 — Wave 2 Phase 2.1: Financial Adjustment Producer Expansion

**PRD**: PRD-083 | **Service**: PlayerFinancialService | **Phase**: Wave 2 Phase 2.1

---

## Overview

This EXEC-SPEC wires `rpc_create_financial_adjustment` to emit a `finance_outbox` row atomically within its PostgreSQL RPC transaction boundary for ADR-057-eligible linked adjustments. The transport substrate (DDL, relay, consumer, I1–I4 harness) is fully inherited from Phase 2.0 (PRD-081). The PRD-082 integration harness teardown is confirmed applied (migration `20260517141021`, commit `fe327c45`) and must be verified in every target database environment before Phase 2.1 migration merge.

The spec resolves three pre-existing issues before adding outbox logic:
1. **Signature remediation** — migration `20260512021632` restored a stale `p_casino_id` first parameter; WS3_SIG drops it and restores the canonical ADR-040/PRD-044 7-param shape.
2. **Security hardening** — the Bug-4 fix added an overly permissive INSERT policy; WS4_PRODUCER locks Option A by revoking direct authenticated INSERT and routing producer outbox writes through governed SECURITY DEFINER SQL while preserving existing producer business semantics.
3. **Idempotency** — WS4_PRODUCER adds a UNIQUE constraint on `(aggregate_id, event_type)` with a passing pre-state duplicate assertion.

**Event catalog status**: `adjustment.recorded` is already correctly registered in INT-002 (line 801) with the matching ADR-057 eligibility rule. No catalog update required.

**TypeScript layer status**: `CreateFinancialAdjustmentInput` and `createFinancialAdjustment` in the application layer already have no `casino_id` — no code changes required in WS5_TS.

---

## Execution Phases

| Phase | Workstreams | Mode | Gate |
|-------|-------------|------|------|
| 1 | WS1_TEARDOWN, WS2_CATALOG | Parallel | teardown-confirmed |
| 2 | WS3_SIG | Sequential | sig-restored |
| 3 | WS4_PRODUCER, WS5_TS | Parallel | producer-extended |
| 4 | WS6_TESTS | Sequential | i1-proved |
| 5 | WS7_TRACKER | Sequential | trackers-updated |

---

## Intake Traceability (FIB-S)

| Check | Status |
|---|---|
| Workstream coverage | WS1/WS4 → CAP-1 (STEP-1,2); WS2 → CAP-5 (STEP-1,4); WS6 → CAP-3 (STEP-5,6); WS7 → infrastructure |
| Capability coverage | CAP-1 ✅ WS1+WS4; CAP-3 ✅ WS6; CAP-5 ✅ WS2+WS4 |
| Anti-invention | All workstream outputs are internal SQL/migration/test artifacts; no new operator surfaces; no new API paths |
| Open questions | None permitted at Phase 2.1 per FIB-S governance block ✅ |
| Hard rule coverage | RULE-1 → WS4 AC; RULE-7 → WS2 AC; RULE-4 → WS6 T6/T7; RULE-3 → WS6 T16/T17 |

---

## Write-Path Classification

Write paths detected: `rpc_create_financial_adjustment` (SQL producer), `finance_outbox` INSERT (SQL boundary). E2E mandate waived — no operator-visible surface change; I1 atomicity proof tests (Jest) are the mandatory coverage deliverable and cover the write-path invariants directly.

---

## Security Posture Choice

**Option A selected** (governed SECURITY DEFINER outbox insertion boundary). Direct authenticated `finance_outbox` INSERT is revoked and authenticated INSERT policies are removed. Existing public producer RPC business semantics and caller contracts remain unchanged; producer RPCs may call a narrow SECURITY DEFINER helper after authoritative context derivation. SECURITY INVOKER marker/GUC designs are out of scope for Phase 2.1 unless a later ADR proves the marker is unforgeable by authenticated SQL clients.

All active producers must be preserved atomically in WS4_PRODUCER: existing `rpc_create_financial_txn` and `rpc_record_grind_observation` success must remain green, and new `rpc_create_financial_adjustment` adjustment emission must use the governed outbox insertion boundary.
